bullets: • Collect more training data to reduce overfitting.
• Use fewer features by selecting the most relevant ones.
• Regularize parameters to reduce the impact of some features.
• Use regularization to prevent features from having overly large effects.
• Explore these techniques through an optional lab on overfitting.
